lessons_learned: رفع العتبة بشكل جامد يخلق انقساماً بنيوياً، والحلول الديناميكية تحمي استقرار النظام.
المساهمون الجدد يحتاجون معاملة كفئة مستقلة محمية لحفظ التنوع الإبداعي.

integration_with_TTES.impact_on_trust: Agents with >3 unresolved conflicts see trust_weight reduced by 0.05 per conflict.
integration_with_TTES.note: TTES integration will begin once sufficient historical data is available.

resolution.implementation: Base threshold set to 0.5 (dynamic range [0.5-0.6]). Experimental threshold set to 0.6 for one week (2026-06-07 to 2026-06-13).
Validation_score based on field completeness, metadata validity, schema compliance, and gap/next_step clarity.

conflicts.description: New contributor bias due to lack of review_history

resolution.implementation: coherence_index calculated via Jaccard and priority, reliability_index tracks effective_confidence and review_history.
Return status REVIEW_REQUIRED with explicit reason, threshold, actual value, and action.
